_info.name: HuggingFace Official MCP Server
_info.description: Official HuggingFace MCP server — search models, datasets, papers, spaces on the Hub. Also exposes all Gradio-based HF Spaces as callable MCP tools.
_info._usage: Pick ONE of the entries below: 'huggingface-online' (SSE, no install) or 'huggingface' (local npx download)

huggingface-online.description: [ONLINE] Connect to HF's hosted MCP Space — no install, needs internet

huggingface.description: [LOCAL] Download & run @huggingface/mcp-server via npx — cached after first run
